title: High-current LED driver benchmark fixture
representative_intent: Constant-current LED driver with thermal/current-density constraints

requirements.text: Represent constant-current LED driver stage, LED output connector and current-set evidence.
Provide high-current trace width, copper/current-density and thermal review evidence.
Connect PWM/analog dimming control with logic isolation/protection review hooks where applicable.
Attach proof-pack, KiCad, manufacturing export, thermal, current-density, regulator and benchmark coverage evidence.

non_claims: This benchmark fixture is repository coverage evidence, not LED thermal safety approval or fabrication approval.
The fixture does not claim luminous performance, thermal safety, current rating adequacy, manufacturability or production readiness.
